name: sdxl_train_ref
purpose: Serenity SDXL cached-data train parity dump contract for predict -> loss -> backward -> optimizer gates.

parity_policy.cpu_pytorch_dry_runs: structural/config/cache/source checks only; never numeric parity
parity_policy.full_finetune_scope: In scope when Serenity registers the SDXL fine-tune loader, setup, data-loader, and saver paths; adapter safetensors remain LoRA-only, and full-weight save/load/resume parity is a separate gate.

training_method_scope.LORA: in scope when Serenity registers loader/setup/data-loader paths
training_method_scope.FINE_TUNE: in scope when Serenity registers loader/setup/data-loader paths
training_method_scope.EMBEDDING: not in scope for this SDXL train-reference scaffold
training_method_scope.FINE_TUNE_VAE: not in scope for this SDXL train-reference scaffold

serenity_reference_contract.setup: BaseStableDiffusionXLSetup.predict encodes or consumes cached CLIP-L/CLIP-G states, concatenates text encoder hidden states, scales latent_image by VAE scaling_factor, samples discrete timestep/noise from train_progress-derived batch_seed, calls UNet with added_cond_kwargs text_embeds and time_ids, and returns epsilon or v_prediction target data.
serenity_reference_contract.loss: BaseStableDiffusionXLSetup.calculate_loss delegates to Serenity diffusion loss mixin and mean-reduces the loss tensor.
serenity_reference_contract.data_loader: StableDiffusionXLBaseDataLoader caches latent_image, original_resolution, crop_offset, crop_resolution, image_path, prompt_1/2, tokens_1/2, frozen text_encoder_1_hidden_state, text_encoder_2_hidden_state, text_encoder_2_pooled_state, concept fields, and optional mask or conditioning latents.
serenity_reference_contract.default_training: Local sdxl_100step_baseline uses STABLE_DIFFUSION_XL_10_BASE/LORA, batch_size 1, resolution 1024, seed 42, AdamW constant LR 1e-4, gradient_accumulation_steps 1, clip_grad_norm 1.0, UNet LoRA rank/alpha 16, frozen text encoders, train dtype BFLOAT_16, UNet/text weights FLOAT_16, VAE FLOAT_32.

step_safetensors_keys.cached_batch: batch.* tensors exactly as Serenity data_loader yields them, including latent_image, tokens_1/2, cached text_encoder hidden/pooled states, resolution/crop fields, loss_weight, concept_type, and optional latent_mask or latent_conditioning_image.
step_safetensors_keys.trace: trace.* tensors captured from Serenity BaseStableDiffusionXLSetup.predict, StableDiffusionXLModel.encode_text, combine_text_encoder_output, and UNet2DConditionModel.forward. Expected keys include cached/text outputs, combined_text_encoder_output, combined_pooled_text_encoder_2_output, scaled_latent_image, latent_noise, scaled_noisy_latent_image, latent_input, unet_timestep, encoder_hidden_states, added_cond_text_embeds, added_cond_time_ids, and predicted_latent_noise.
step_safetensors_keys.outputs: output.timestep, output.predicted, output.target, optional output.prior_target, output.loss_pre_scale, and output.loss_for_backward.

adapter_safetensors_keys.policy: LoRA-only. FINE_TUNE configs must not dump full-weight params through adapter_safetensors; full-finetune save/load/resume parity is a separate full-weight gate.
adapter_safetensors_keys.initial: adapter_initial.* trainable SDXL LoRA tensors when --adapter-dump initial is used.
adapter_safetensors_keys.step: adapter_before.*, adapter_pre.*, adapter_post.*, and adapter_after.* trainable SDXL LoRA tensors when named trainable params are exposed.
adapter_safetensors_keys.step-with-grads: adapter_before.*, adapter_pre.*, adapter_pre_clip.*, adapter_pre_clip_grad.*, adapter_post.*, adapter_post_clip.*, adapter_post_clip_grad.*, and adapter_after.* trainable SDXL LoRA tensors/gradients.
adapter_safetensors_keys.full_finetune: not emitted by this adapter dump path

required_reports: reference_policy with reference=Serenity only and dry_run_numeric_parity=false
Serenity registration status for LORA and FINE_TUNE using source paths
base/vae/lora model names and text encoder include flags
cache directory, image cache status, and text cache status using recursive file counts
single-file or diffusers-dir local model status
structured_blockers with stable id, category, message, and details

bounded_run_notes: The script is single-process only and enforces --max-steps 1.
Dry-run does not load the SDXL model, writes parity/sdxl_train_ref_blockers.json, and is structural only.
Dry-run/blocker artifacts set numeric_parity_claimed=false and never claim numeric parity.
Non-dry-run refuses CPU train_device because CPU PyTorch is not numeric parity evidence.
By default it requires the existing 100-step baseline artifact, existing image/text caches, and local weights.
It imports Serenity from /home/alex/Serenity and chdirs there before importing modules.util.create because Serenity factory.import_dir uses cwd-relative module paths.
It preserves tensor storage dtype in safetensors dumps; scalar stats in JSON are computed in float32 where needed.
SDXL adapter safetensors are LoRA-only; FINE_TUNE full-weight parity requires a separate full-weight gate.
It does not call GenericTrainer.end(), so it does not perform Serenity final model saves.
It does not edit Serenity source, SDXL LoRA files, SDXL sampler files, or Mojo runtime files.
